mentions.note: The post-earnings sell-off looked overdone; Cramer still rates CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy highly and calls the stock a buy.
Infrastructure play immune from AI disruption; 30% growth, 125% retention; partnerships with Anthropic and OpenAI prove platform indispensability.
Databricks disruption narrative similar to FICO; first decent price in long time; buy on dips but expect daily destruction headlines.
33% revenue growth; 38% RPO growth; AI business booming; $6B AWS partnership and Natoma acquisition position as control plane for enterprise AI; reframes from software to consumption platform.
Data-management platform surged 36% (+$64 single session) on quarter, AI-partnership success (Anthropic, OpenAI, AWS); triumph over AI-displacement fears signals bullish for sector.
Phenomenal post-quarter rally continuing with 7% gain; real conversion from enterprise software company to genuine AI data company
